PR #132 battery history (3 rounds).
ROUND 1 (initial head): Claude — math verified sound (slope=OLS numerically confirmed; sigma_7d/delta_7d ARE minutes via x60; no efficiency double-scaling; clock wrap correct; consumers complete; -0 safe; touch-set matched); P3s: ≈0.0 headlines, export/card parity gap, two test gaps, _HOUR_PREDICTORS comment falsehood. Codex — P2 evening-clock columns raw 0-24 (after-midnight corrupts slope/bins; converged with Claude's comment finding; pre-existing in correlations → BUG #134 FILED on milestone, display suppressed here); P2 cutoff-equal rows mislabeled 'before'. Codex security: no DoS (250k rows), 97 tests. Gitleaks: known cache FPs.
FIX ROUND 1 (010a75c): _UNNORMALIZED_CLOCK suppression (#134 ref), 'or earlier' labels, |v|<0.05 headline floor, _weekly_factor_item export parity w/ escape invariant, sigma_7d minutes-tie test, effectFormat + CorrelationList tests, wave-doc scope updates.
RE-RUN (full battery on 010a75c): Claude — passes; suppression completeness verified (mutation: removing a column fails the contrast leg); export holes all _esc/numeric; ≈ entity renders; bin-label blast radius clean; sigma expected value independently derived (ddof=1, 32.071 min, catches ddof/×60 regressions); LOW-1 export :g vs SPA rounding, LOW-2 redundant belt-and-braces check (kept). Codex — P2 correlation rows horizontal flex renders new lines side-by-side (jsdom-blind); P2 export magnitude parity (converged w/ Claude LOW-1); Info unit/direction holes semantically safe but not grep-literal. Codex security: T-04 maintained, escape tests cover the new holes; no new surface. Gitleaks: known cache FPs.
FIX ROUND 2 (final head): .correlation-row → column flex; export magnitude mirrors fmtMagnitude exactly (parity test 2.34→2.3, 12.34→12); _esc moved to the hole. Delta-verified: CSS+formatter+test only; backend 550 + frontend 289 green, cold-cache lint, build.

--- RE-ATTESTATION (base-advance) 2026-07-22 ---
Strict up-to-date refused the merge after wave lanes #135/#136/#137 advanced dev; origin/dev merged in cleanly (touch-sets disjoint by wave plan — caffeine chart/sunlight/dashboard-copy/Makefile vs this PR's stats surfaces). Combined state verified: backend 550, frontend 311 (grew with the lanes' tests), no conflicts. Delta is the merge commit only; no code changes to this PR's content.
